titleStmt.title: Einfeltigen Fruchten und Spitzen für die Goldshmidt und andere Liebhaber gemacht durch Michael Blondinus Fecit

zone.note: Im so sorry I've been looking for so long but have no idea what it could be other than a shield
i honestly think they are fruit but not really a grape vine, can't really tell for sure what they would classify as underneath the three birds/swan
I label the entire thing as strapwork pattern basically, I just couldnt internally wrap the entire print.
okay one thing im confused about is that it looks like strapwork pattern, but it looks like an illustrated ribbon? I put both motifs as a label but I am not sure if it would be one or the other

div.p: Einfeltigen Fruchten und Spitzen für die Goldschmidt und andere Liebhaber gemacht durch Michael Blondius Fecit
Simple fruits and laces for Goldsmiths and other lovers of art, made by Michiel Le Blon.
